description: A plain candid arrest photograph with no on-image text, slogan, or agency-seal overlay. Shot outdoors in front of a black metal fence with a tan building and parking lot behind, it shows a handcuffed bearded man in a black t-shirt and gray cargo pants standing in the center facing the camera, flanked by two officers (photographed from behind) wearing tactical plate carriers: the left vest reads 'POLICE,' the right vest reads 'HSI' (Homeland Security Investigations). The image documents an ICE/HSI arrest. Marked is_designed=false because it is a documentary photo without graphic/meme design treatment - only the gear labels are visible text. Tweet context identifies the detainee as Haitian national Dimitri Vorbe, arrested by ICE Miami Sept. 23 pending removal proceedings.
notable_text: (no on-image text; vest labels POLICE and HSI)
